title: Learning to Ride a Bike 学骑自行车
scene: Mom教Emma骑自行车，去掉辅助轮。

lines.en: Mom, can you take off the training wheels today?
lines.zh: 妈妈，今天能把辅助轮拆了吗？

lines.en: Are you sure? You might fall.
lines.zh: 你确定吗？你可能会摔倒的。

lines.en: I am ready. I want to ride like a big kid!
lines.zh: 我准备好了。我想像大孩子一样骑！

lines.en: I am scared. What if I fall?
lines.zh: 我害怕。万一摔了怎么办？

lines.en: Do not worry. I will hold the back of the bike.
lines.zh: 别担心。我会扶着车后座。

lines.en: OK, I am pedaling now. Do not let go!
lines.zh: 好的，我踩踏板了。别松手！

lines.en: You are doing great! Keep pedaling!
I let go a while ago! You are riding by yourself!
lines.zh: 我早就松手了！你在自己骑呢！

lines.en: Wow! I did it! I can ride a bike!
lines.zh: 哇！我做到了！我会骑自行车了！
